author: vikrant-akavaram
name: SDPA-Compatible 11L Record Fork — Blackwell GPU Training
blurb: Adapted the 1.1147 BPB record entry to run on non-Hopper GPUs via SDPA fallback. Validated on NVIDIA Blackwell GB10 (sm_121a): val_bpb=1.4362 at 7000 steps with 16K batch on single GPU. Includes hyperparameter ablation (QK-Gain sweep, WD tuning) and negative results (SSM hybrid, MoE, self-distillation). On 8xH100 with FA3, expected to match ~1.11 BPB.
attention_backend: F.scaled_dot_product_attention (SDPA fallback, FA3 unavailable on sm_121a)
calibration: AR self-generated (64 seqs x 2048 tokens, temp=0.8, no external data)
technique_summary: SDPA fallback for non-Hopper GPUs + 11L XSA-all BigramHash3072 GPTQ-int6 LZMA9 stack
novel_contributions: SDPA fallback enabling Blackwell/non-Hopper GPU training
Hyperparameter ablation on single GPU (QK-Gain, WD)
Negative results: SSM hybrid, MoE, self-distillation
